Crystal Clear Pools, Every Time

Professional pool cleaning and maintenance services you can trust. We keep your pool sparkling clean so you can focus on making memories.

Our Services Get Quote

Reliable Weekly Service

Scheduled maintenance that fits your lifestyle. Never worry about pool upkeep again with our comprehensive cleaning packages.

Schedule Service

Emergency Pool Care

Pool problems don't wait for convenient times. Our emergency service gets your pool back to perfect condition fast.

Emergency Service

Why Choose Keep It Clean?

We're not just another pool service company. We're your neighbors, committed to delivering exceptional care for your pool investment.

Reliable & Punctual

Scheduled service you can count on. We arrive on time, every time, with consistent quality that exceeds expectations. Your pool maintenance runs like clockwork.

Expert Technicians

Certified professionals with years of experience in pool chemistry, equipment repair, and maintenance. We solve problems others can't and prevent issues before they start.

Transparent Pricing

No hidden fees, no surprises. Our upfront pricing includes everything you need for pristine pool maintenance. You'll know exactly what to expect, every month.

Complete Pool Care Services

From routine maintenance to emergency repairs, we handle every aspect of pool care with professional expertise and attention to detail.

Weekly Pool Cleaning

Comprehensive cleaning including skimming, vacuuming, brushing walls, and emptying baskets. Your pool stays pristine week after week.

Chemical Balancing

Professional water testing and chemical adjustment to maintain perfect pH, chlorine, and alkalinity levels for safe, comfortable swimming.

Equipment Maintenance

Regular inspection and maintenance of pumps, filters, heaters, and automation systems to prevent costly breakdowns and extend equipment life.

View All Services

Professional Tools

Commercial-grade equipment and eco-friendly chemicals for superior results every visit.

Pool Owner

Business Owner

"Professional service from start to finish. They transformed our neglected pool into a sparkling oasis. Great communication and fair pricing. Highly recommend to anyone!"
